recommended_sources.name: System Logs
recommended_sources.description: Captures system-level events such as login attempts, file access, and process creation.
recommended_sources.collection_method: Collect logs from the operating system's log files (e.g. /var/log/syslog)

recommended_sources.name: Network Logs
recommended_sources.description: Captures network traffic and communication between systems.
recommended_sources.collection_method: Collect logs from network devices (e.g. firewalls, routers) or use a network monitoring tool.

recommended_sources.name: Application Logs
recommended_sources.description: Captures application-specific events such as user interactions and data access.
recommended_sources.collection_method: Collect logs from the application's log files or use an application monitoring tool.

recommended_sources.name: Model Training Logs
recommended_sources.description: Captures events related to model training, such as data loading and model updates.
recommended_sources.collection_method: Collect logs from the model training process or use a machine learning monitoring tool.

fields.name: user_id
fields.description: User ID associated with the event

fields.name: model_name
fields.description: Name of the model being trained
